Rankings.1. Templates: Extreme contamination. The frontend and backend templates (packages/generators/src/templates/*) physically enforce the existence of an entity to build any functional view, and hard-code Prisma ORM and Express REST router patterns.
Rankings.2. Planner: High contamination. The ArchitecturePlanner forces the generation of an `entities` array and an `apis` array in its output schema, structurally preventing capability-driven logic.
Rankings.3. Analyzer: Medium contamination. The FrontendAIAnalyzer explicitly maps REST API endpoints to frontend Axios service files.
Rankings.4. Router: Medium contamination. The GenerationRouter defaults to the `crud-admin` (Scaffolder) pipeline for any unrecognized app type.
Rankings.5. Validators: Low contamination. Validators mostly check for valid TypeScript/React syntax, but some (like FunctionalFlowValidator) implicitly check for entity presence.
